teaching_arc.entry_point: Welcome back, callback Topic 18 derivative tests; open with a concrete fencing problem where area depends on one width.
teaching_arc.progression: Five-step workflow → verify extrema (endpoints vs interior) → classic worked examples with math_solution_steps → cost/geometry applications → recap.
teaching_arc.destination: Students translate word problems to f(x), find and verify optima, and interpret with units; tease Topic 20 L'Hopital.

topic_goal: Teach optimization from word problems through constraint reduction, critical points, and endpoint verification, building on Topic 18 derivative tests.
topic_takeaways: Five-step workflow: diagram, constraint, objective, critical points, verify (with endpoints).
Reduce multivariable setups using the constraint before differentiating.
Pair interior critical points with domain endpoint checks.
Interpret answers with units; avoid face-count and open-top traps.
Classic templates: farmer pen, open box, mixed-material cost.
style_notes: Welcome back, do not re-introduce Arian from scratch.
Callback Topic 18 first/second derivative tests when confirming max vs min.
path_topic_19 current; Topic 20 L'Hopital marked next on roadmap.
visual_lab s02: demo tab A on YouTube; mention B/C on site.
pause_and_reveal on s05 and s07, real think beats before solutions.
Narrate flex_plot probe motion before naming the optimum.
math_solution_steps: target step_1..step_n in reveal order for generation.
transition_style: Word problem → constraint/objective → calculus → verify → interpret.

slide_ref.source_title: Optimization Problems: From Word Problems to Calculus Solutions

slides.narration_seed: Welcome back to Arian University. Topic 18 gave you derivative tests; Topic 19 applies them to real constraints, fencing, boxes, cost.
slides.transition_to_next: Roadmap on objectives, path_topic_19 current, L'Hopital next.

slides.narration_seed: Five objectives: translate constraints, follow the workflow, verify endpoints, interpret units, reduce variables.
slides.transition_from_previous: From title hook into roadmap promise.

slides.narration_seed: 2400 ft fence beside a river, drag width on the area parabola. Prediction before the peak at 600.
Nested five steps on the left; visual_lab tabs farmer, box, cost, each with distinct objective curve.
Q=f(x) after elimination; dual-curve plot shows objective and constraint-bound length.
theorem_box for single critical point on open interval; misconception_compare endpoints vs interior only; quadratic family max then min.
Pause, five steps on your own. flex_plot without optimum label; reveal width 600 after think beat.
likely_student_confusion: What width and length maximize area?

slides.narration_seed: math_solution_steps: constraint, A(x), A'=0, x=600, y=1200, area 720000. Widget marks vertex.
slides.narration_seed_detail: Direct sub on step_1 constraint. step_4 x=600. step_5 parts y and area.

slides.narration_seed: Volume 32000 cm³, minimize open-top surface. Pause on S(x) shape before solution.
splitAfter math_solution_steps: h=32000/x², S(x), S'=0, x=40, h=20, S=4800.
misconception_compare open top five faces vs six; flex_plot overlays S_open and S_closed.

slide_ref.source_title: Tricky Example: Box with Different Material Costs

slides.narration_seed: Side area 6wh not 8wh; math_solution_steps on C(w); minimum near w=1.65 m.

slide_ref.source_title: Edge Case: Point on a Line Closest to Origin

slides.narration_seed: Minimize d²=5x²+4x+1; closest point (-2/5, 1/5). flex_plot line + markers.
Minimize T(x); Snell's Law sin θ1/v1 = sin θ2/v2; flex_plot total time curve.

slides.narration_seed: Optional MVT proof sketch for single critical point on open interval.
Translate, reduce, differentiate, verify with endpoints, interpret. Next: L'Hopital's Rule.
